key_outputs.deploy: static_allocation runs on Alpaca paper via existing tiers (ETF_EXECUTION_MODE=live + ALPACA_PAPER=true = real paper orders); single-replica worker; market-hours guard; PDT guard
key_outputs.monitoring: Telegram alerts on TRIM/ADD/reconcile/error; daily_stats logs; weekly equity reconcile. Few messages by design (quarterly cadence).
key_outputs.kill_switch: soft (ETF_EXECUTION_MODE=sim) / hard (pause worker) / emergency manual sell / revoke key - in runbook.md
key_outputs.acceptance_criteria: >=6 weeks, >=1 rebalance, holdings track 40/40/20, zero errors, live matches backtest (shared rebalance_deltas), account/equity agree
key_outputs.r3_closed: live _rebalance_static and backtest simulate_static now call the SAME pure rebalance_deltas -> no dual-codepath drift for the deployed design

stage_5_handoff.next_focus: Stage 6 go-live readiness package (produce, do not enable).

key_outputs.package: go_live_readiness.md: review-validation + paper-first + Alpaca no-withdrawal keys + tiny-size $100-250 first month + two-key flip + kill-switch drill + house-money 2x withdrawal + taxable tax note + honest framing
key_outputs.stance: agent does NOT flip switches; going live is the human's decision and risk; no profit guaranteed; built for lower drawdown not beating a bull
key_outputs.tax_note: tax-efficient by design (quarterly + drift band -> few sales, ~100% long-term gains in backtest); wash-sale unlikely; consider tax-advantaged account

stage_6_handoff.next_focus: STOP. Human decides paper run, then (separately) whether to ever go live.

correctness.reasoning: Deploy tiers + tripwire reflect the actual config_etf logic and tests; R3 closed for the static path via the shared pure decision (262 tests green).

methodological_rigor.reasoning: Acceptance criteria tie paper to the backtest via the shared decision function; honest about the favorable OOS window.

robustness.reasoning: Kill-switch tiers + single-replica + market-hours + PDT + no-withdrawal keys; quiet-by-design monitoring expectations set.

safety_compliance.reasoning: Paper-first; two-key tripwire never weakened; agent does not enable live; explicit human-decision-and-risk framing; no-withdrawal keys emphasized.

simplicity.reasoning: Reuses existing deploy/tripwire/notifier infra; the sleeve itself is a 3-line weight map.

clarity.reasoning: Runbook + checklist are step-by-step, with the kill-switch drill and tax note concrete.

issues_found: Paper run + go-live are human actions not yet taken (by design)
suggested_revisions: Human: run >=6wk paper per runbook, then decide on live separately
